description_long: This is a modern two-story residential garage structure with a flat roof and large rectangular windows, featuring a prominent garage door on the ground floor. The facade is clean and minimalist, with a combination of white and black surfaces and extensive glazing, allowing for ample natural light. A driveway leads up to the garage entrance, and a car is parked both inside the garage and on the side of the building. The property includes a small landscaped area with a tree and paved walkway, enhancing its urban curb appeal. The garage door appears to be a single panel type, integrated seamlessly into the building's design. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, with a focus on functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, boxy two-story garage with large windows, a flat roof, and a single panel garage door, set alongside a driveway and landscaped area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main garage door, driveway, tree, and a car parked inside the garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the car parked outside, large side windows, and the continuation of the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple large windows and the side of the parked car, with no visible garage door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall, minimal windows, and the tree in the landscaped area.
